claims.claim_text: Senate Bill 1203 requires state agencies to publish greenhouse gas (GHG) emission inventories and create plans for achieving net zero emissions from their own operations by 2035.
SB 1158 improves the reporting methods for utilities and community choice aggregators to provide a more accurate picture of California's energy sources.
SB 887 accelerates the construction of transmission needed to deliver new clean energy resources in California.
SB 1032 proposes a study to identify ways to accelerate the development of electrical transmission in California to achieve the state's GHG goals.
SB 1112 supports equitable financing for climate-beneficial building upgrades through utility investment programs.
SB 1301 establishes California's first manufacturing tax credit specifically for clean energy products.
SB 1008 eliminates telecom fees for communications to and from incarcerated people in California prisons or jails.
SB 876 directs the implementation of the Digital Education Equity Program to provide equitable educational technology support to school districts.
SB 1407 creates a hub in the Governor’s Office of Business and Economic Development focused on employee ownership.
SB 948 allows for more efficient use of resources for affordable housing projects in California.
SB 1000 seeks to protect the public's right to access police radio communications.
SB 1419 adds new protections for patients regarding the communication of sensitive information about their clinical laboratory tests.
